mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT a.work_Instruct_code , a.work_name , z.prod_name , c.emp_name , c.emp_code , NVL(TO_CHAR(b.registration_date,'yyyy-MM-dd'),'지정된 계획 없음')registration_date , CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_progress f WHERE f.work_instruct_detail_code LIKE a.work_instruct_code||'%') = 0 THEN '요청' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_progress f WHERE f.work_instruct_detail_code LIKE a.work_instruct_code||'%' AND process_status IN ('PS2','PS1'))=0 THEN '처리완료' ELSE '처리중' END as status FROM work_instruct a LEFT OUTER JOIN manu_plan b ON a.manu_plan_code = b.manu_plan_code LEFT OUTER JOIN emp c ON a.emp_code=c.emp_code LEFT OUTER JOIN work_instruct_detail d ON a.work_instruct_code=d.work_instruct_code LEFT OUTER JOIN prod_common e ON d.prod_code=e.prod_code JOIN (select work_instruct_code, case when count(work_instruct_code)=1 then min(prod_name) else min(prod_name)||'외'||(count(work_instruct_code)-1)||'건' end as prod_name from work_instruct_detail a JOIN prod_common b ON a.prod_code=b.prod_code group by work_instruct_code) z ON a.work_instruct_code=z.work_instruct_code
AND ${search} like '%${keyword}%'
order by length(status),to_number(SUBSTR(a.work_instruct_code,INSTR(a.work_instruct_code, '-', 1, 2)+1)) desc

SELECT a.work_name , d.plan_name , a.registration_date , a.manu_start_date , a.manu_end_date , e.emp_name , e.emp_code , c.prod_name , b.priority , b.instruct_quantity , get_mes_sub_code_name(b.process_status) as process_status , a.work_instruct_code , b.prod_code , c.unit , b.work_instruct_detail_code FROM work_instruct a LEFT OUTER JOIN work_instruct_detail b ON(a.work_instruct_code = b.work_instruct_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN prod_common c ON(b.prod_code = c.prod_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN manu_plan d ON(a.manu_plan_code = d.manu_plan_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN emp e ON(a.emp_code = e.emp_code) WHERE a.work_instruct_code = #{workInstructCode} ORDER BY 11, to_number(SUBSTR(a.work_instruct_code,INSTR(a.work_instruct_code, '-', 1, 2)+1)), d.registration_date, priority

SELECT a.work_name , d.plan_name , f.order_name , a.registration_date , a.manu_start_date , a.manu_end_date , e.emp_name , e.emp_code , c.prod_name , b.priority , b.instruct_quantity , get_mes_sub_code_name(b.process_status) as process_status , a.work_instruct_code , b.prod_code , c.unit , b.work_instruct_detail_code FROM work_instruct a LEFT OUTER JOIN work_instruct_detail b ON(a.work_instruct_code = b.work_instruct_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN prod_common c ON(b.prod_code = c.prod_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN manu_plan d ON(a.manu_plan_code = d.manu_plan_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN emp e ON(a.emp_code = e.emp_code) LEFT OUTER JOIN ORDERS f ON d.order_code = f.order_code WHERE ${search1} like '%${keyword1}%' AND ${search2} like '%${keyword2}%'
AND a.manu_end_date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND a.manu_start_date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND a.manu_start_date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND a.manu_end_date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND a.manu_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate1} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND a.manu_end_date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND a.manu_start_date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND a.manu_end_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate2} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND a.manu_start_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate1} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND a.manu_end_date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate2} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
ORDER BY length(process_status), to_number(SUBSTR(a.work_instruct_code,INSTR(a.work_instruct_code, '-', 1, 2)+1)), d.registration_date, priority

SELECT ms.lot , mc.mat_Name , e.emp_Name , e.rank , e.dept_id , ms.store_Date , mi.inspect_Date , ms.store_Quantity , mc.unit , ms.mat_Inspect_Code , mi.note FROM mat_store ms LEFT OUTER JOIN mat_common mc ON ms.mat_code = mc.mat_code LEFT OUTER JOIN emp e ON ms.emp_code=e.emp_code LEFT OUTER JOIN mat_inspect mi ON ms.mat_inspect_code = mi.mat_inspect_code
WHERE ${search1} like '%${keyword1}%' AND ${search2} like '%${keyword2}%'
AND ms.store_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND ms.store_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND ms.store_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND mi.inspect_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND ms.store_Date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate1} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND mi.inspect_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND ms.store_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND mi.inspect_Date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate2} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND ms.store_Date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate1} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND mi.inspect_Date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate2} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
ORDER BY to_number(SUBSTR(ms.lot,INSTR(ms.lot, '-', 1, 2)+1)) desc

SELECT work_name, prod_name, emp_name, rank, dept_id, mh.lot, mc.mat_name, hold_quantity, mc.unit, get_mes_sub_code_name(progress) as progress FROM mat_hold mh JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON mh.work_instruct_detail_code=wid.work_instruct_detail_code JOIN work_instruct wi ON wi.work_instruct_code=wid.work_instruct_code JOIN emp e ON e.emp_code = wi.emp_code JOIN mat_store ms ON mh.lot=ms.lot JOIN mat_common mc ON mc.mat_code=ms.mat_code JOIN prod_common pc ON pc.prod_code = wid.prod_code WHERE ${search1} like '%${keyword1}%' AND ${search2} like '%${keyword2}%' ORDER BY 10, to_number(SUBSTR(mh.lot,INSTR(mh.lot, '-', 1, 2)+1)) desc

SELECT ms.lot mat_lot, mc.mat_name, wi.work_name, pc.prod_name, mr.mat_release_code, mr.release_date, mr.release_quantity, mc.unit, ps.lot prod_lot FROM mat_release mr JOIN mat_hold mh ON mh.mat_hold_code=mr.mat_hold_code JOIN mat_store ms ON mh.lot=ms.lot JOIN mat_common mc ON ms.mat_code=mc.mat_code JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON wid.work_instruct_detail_code = mr.work_instruct_detail_code JOIN work_instruct wi ON wid.work_instruct_code = wi.work_instruct_code JOIN prod_common pc ON pc.prod_code = wid.prod_code JOIN prod_store ps ON ps.work_instruct_detail_code = wid.work_instruct_detail_code
WHERE ${search1} like '%${keyword1}%'
AND mr.release_Date > TO_DATE('${startDate2} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
AND mr.release_Date BETWEEN TO_DATE('${startDate1} 00:00','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AND TO_DATE('${endDate1} 23:59','yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI')
ORDER BY to_number(SUBSTR(mr.mat_release_code,INSTR(mr.mat_release_code, '-', 1, 2)+1)) desc

SELECT mat_name, safetystock, SUM(NVL(ms.store_quantity,0))-SUM(NVL(mr.release_quantity,0)) as stock,unit FROM mat_common mc left outer JOIN mat_store ms ON ms.mat_code=mc.mat_code left outer JOIN mat_hold mh ON mh.lot=ms.lot left outer JOIN mat_release mr ON mr.mat_hold_code=mh.mat_hold_code GROUP BY mat_name,safetystock,unit ORDER BY mat_name

select a.mat_code, b.mat_name, a.use_amount, NVL(c.hold_quantity,0) hold_quantity,b.unit from bom a JOIN mat_common b ON a.mat_code=b.mat_code LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT mat_code, sum(hold_quantity) as hold_quantity FROM mat_hold d JOIN mat_store e ON d.lot = e.lot WHERE work_instruct_detail_code = #{workInstructDetailCode} GROUP BY mat_code) c ON a.mat_code = c.mat_code where prod_code=#{prodCode} ORDER BY a.mat_code

SELECT a.lot, a.mat_code, c.mat_name, a.store_quantity-NVL(sum(b.hold_quantity),0) stock FROM mat_store a LEFT OUTER JOIN mat_hold b ON a.lot = b.lot JOIN mat_common c ON a.mat_code=c.mat_code WHERE a.mat_code=#{matCode} GROUP BY a.lot, a.mat_code, c.mat_name, a.store_quantity HAVING a.store_quantity-NVL(sum(b.hold_quantity),0)>0 ORDER BY to_number(SUBSTR(a.lot,INSTR(a.lot, '-', 1, 2)+1))
SELECT prod_name, prod_code, unit FROM prod_common ORDER BY to_number(SUBSTR(prod_code,INSTR(prod_code, '-', 1, 1)+1))

{ call insert_work_list(#{wList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=WORK_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.WorkInstructDetailArrayTypeHandler}, #{p_work_instruct_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }

{ call delete_work_list(#{wList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=WORK_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.WorkInstructDetailArrayTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }
{ call update_work_list(#{wList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=WORK_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.WorkInstructDetailArrayTypeHandler}) }
{ call insert_mat_hold(#{wList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=WORK_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.WorkInstructDetailArrayTypeHandler}) }

SELECT prog.work_progress_code, prog.proc_code, get_proc_name(prog.proc_code) AS "proc_name", prog.work_instruct_detail_code, wid.prod_code, find_prod_name(wid.prod_code) AS "prod_name", pe.perf_code, pe.input_quantity, pe.error_quantity, pe.prod_quantity, pe.work_start_date, pe.work_end_date, pe.fac_code, get_fac_name(pe.fac_code) AS "fac_name", pe.worker AS "emp_code", find_emp_name(pe.worker) AS "emp_name" FROM work_progress prog JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON (prog.work_instruct_detail_code = wid.work_instruct_detail_code) JOIN perf pe ON (prog.work_progress_code = pe.work_progress_code) WHERE pe.perf_code = #{perfCode}

SELECT c.work_name , e.proc_name , a.proc_num , d.prod_name , TO_CHAR(c.registration_date,'yyyy-MM-dd') as registration_date , c.manu_end_date , a.instruct_quantity , a.input_quantity , a.error_quantity , a.prod_quantity , a.progress , a.work_progress_code , a.proc_code , d.unit FROM work_progress a JOIN work_instruct_detail b ON a.work_instruct_detail_code = b.work_instruct_detail_code JOIN work_instruct c ON b.work_instruct_code = c.work_instruct_code JOIN prod_common d ON b.prod_code = d.prod_code JOIN proc e ON a.proc_code = e.proc_code WHERE a.instruct_quantity-a.input_quantity != 0 AND d.prod_code LIKE '%${prodCode}%' AND e.proc_code LIKE '%${procCode}%' AND a.work_progress_code LIKE '%${workProgressCode}' AND e.proc_class_code != 'PC1' ORDER BY c.registration_date desc,to_number(SUBSTR(c.work_instruct_code,INSTR(c.work_instruct_code, '-', 1, 2)+1)) desc,a.proc_num
SELECT proc_name, proc_code FROM proc WHERE proc_class_code !='PC1' ORDER BY proc_name

SELECT a.fac_code , a.fac_name , get_mes_sub_code_name(a.fac_status) as fac_status FROM fac a JOIN proc b ON a.fac_class_code = b.fac_class_code JOIN work_progress c ON b.proc_code=c.proc_code WHERE c.work_progress_code = #{workProgressCode} AND a.fac_status = 'FS1'
SELECT emp_code, emp_name, dept_id FROM emp
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perf WHERE work_end_date is null AND worker = #{empCode}

SELECT TO_CHAR(a.work_start_date,'yyyy-MM-dd') as work_start_date, a.input_quantity, a.error_quantity, a.prod_quantity, fac_name, a.perf_code FROM perf a JOIN fac b ON a.fac_code = b.fac_code WHERE a.work_end_date IS NULL AND worker = #{empCode}

{ call save_perf(#{p_input_perf_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_input_prod_quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_input_error_quantity, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }
{ call end_perf(#{p_input_perf_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})}
SELECT find_emp_name(#{empCode}) FROM DUAL
SELECT get_fac_name(#{facCode}) FROM DUAL
SELECT find_prod_name(prod_code) FROM work_instruct_detail WHERE work_instruct_detail_code = (SELECT work_instruct_detail_code FROM work_progress WHERE work_progress_code = #{workProgressCode})

{ call insert_new_perf_data( #{p_emp_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_fac_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_work_progress_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_input_quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER, mode=IN}, #{p_output_perf_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})}

SELECT a.plan_name, b.order_name, c.emp_name, a.registration_date, a.start_date, a.end_date, a.note, a.emp_code, a.manu_plan_code, CASE WHEN NVL(w.ps2_cnt,0)>0 THEN '처리중' WHEN NVL(w.ps1_cnt,1)>0 AND NVL(w.ps3_cnt,0)=0 THEN '요청' ELSE '처리완료' END AS process_status FROM manu_plan a LEFT OUTER JOIN orders b ON a.order_code = b.order_code JOIN emp c ON a.emp_code = c.emp_code LEFT JOIN (SELECT e.manu_plan_code,SUM(CASE WHEN d.process_status = 'PS3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ps3_cnt ,SUM(CASE WHEN d.process_status = 'PS2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ps2_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN d.process_status = 'PS1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ps1_cnt FROM work_instruct e LEFT JOIN work_instruct_detail d ON d.work_instruct_code = e.work_instruct_code GROUP BY e.manu_plan_code) w ON a.manu_plan_code = w.manu_plan_code WHERE ${search} LIKE '%${keyword}%' ORDER BY length(process_status), a.start_date DESC

select manu_plan_detail_code , b.prod_name , a.prod_code , priority , plan_quantity , get_mes_sub_code_name(PROCESS_STATUS) as process_status , b.unit FROM manu_plan_detail a JOIN prod_common b ON a.prod_code = b.prod_code WHERE manu_plan_code = #{manuPlanCode}
{ call insert_plan_list(#{mList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=PLAN_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.ManuPlanDetailArrayTypeHandler}) }
{ call delete_manu_plan(#{p_manu_plan_code, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=IN}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT}) }

{ call update_manu_plan(#{pList, javaType=java.util.List, jdbcType=ARRAY, jdbcTypeName=PLAN_LIST, mode=IN, typeHandler=com.aio.mes.mybatis.config.ManuPlanDetailArrayTypeHandler}, #{p_output_msg, jdbcType=VARCHAR, mode=OUT})}

SELECT NVL(get_plan_name(wi.manu_plan_code), '계획없음') AS plan_name, wi.work_name, find_emp_name(wi.emp_code) AS emp_name, wi.registration_date, wi.manu_start_date, wi.manu_end_date, find_prod_name(wid.prod_code) AS prod_name, wid.instruct_quantity, get_mes_sub_code_name(wid.process_status) AS process_status, wp.proc_num, get_proc_name(wp.proc_code) AS proc_name, wp.instruct_quantity AS instruct_quantity_wp, wp.input_quantity, wp.error_quantity, wp.prod_quantity, wp.progress FROM work_progress wp JOIN work_instruct_detail wid ON(wp.work_instruct_detail_code = wid.work_instruct_detail_code) JOIN work_instruct wi ON(wid.work_instruct_code = wi.work_instruct_code)
WHERE wid.process_status IN ('PS1', 'PS2', 'PS3')
WHERE wid.process_status = #{select1Val}
AND get_plan_name(wi.manu_plan_code) LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND wi.work_name LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND find_prod_name(wid.prod_code) LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND get_proc_name(wp.proc_code) LIKE '%' || #{selectInputVal} || '%'
AND wi.registration_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{registStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{registEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND wi.registration_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{manuBeginStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{manuBeginEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND wi.registration_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{manuCloseStartDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{manuCloseEndDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY wi.registration_date, wp.work_instruct_detail_code, proc_num
